role: Second Brigadier General; Official IRGC Spokesperson (d. 20 March 2026)
bio: Ali Mohammad Naini served as Second Brigadier General and the official spokesperson of the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed on 20 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 20 March 2026. Official IRGC Spokesperson, Second Brigadier General rank.
